page.title: Milling
page.subtitle: The dry-mill readiness gate and run skeleton. A parchment lot cannot open a run until it is rested and in spec.

chain.title: Dry-mill chain
chain.subtitle: Five stages, parchment to export green.

card.gateNote: Record an in-spec reading (moisture 10.5-11.5%, aw below 0.60, rested) to open a run.

empty.title: No parchment lots in the mill pipeline
empty.description: When a lot finishes drying and rests as parchment it lands here, ready for the spec gate.

gate.title: Reposo / spec gate
gate.noLots: No parchment lots are waiting for the mill right now.
gate.previewFail: This reading does not pass the gate yet.
gate.previewReposo: Blocked upstream: the lot is not reposo-cleared.
gate.kgHint: The parchment mass entering the chain.
gate.blockedNote: The run stays shut until a reading passes the gate. The database is the wall, not just this form.

errors.generic: Could not save that. Try again.
